name: Smoked Salmon Crepe Spirals
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons cream cheese at room temperature
2 tablespoons unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, puree half the smoked salmon.
2. Add the cream cheese, butter, lemon juice, and blend until smooth.
3. Transfer the mixture to a bowl and stir in the dill.
4. On each crepe, spread a thin layer of 1/4 of the puree mixture.
5. Top with an equal amount of smoked salmon slices.
6. Roll the crepe tightly to enclose the filling.
7. Chill seam side down, covered for at least 1 hour, or until firm enough to slice.
8. Slice diagonally into 1/4-inch thick spirals.
Yield: 24 hors d'oeuvres
